fullText:
Technic Coaster is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Legoland California in Carlsbad, California, USA.

The ride is a stock model from Mack Rides known as Large Park Wild Mouse.

Black track and blue supports.

The cars are designed to look like they were built using Lego Technic bricks.
